name: Elite Credit Solutions Michigan Credit Repair
description_short: Elite Credit Solutions Michigan Credit Repair is a credit repair provider based in Detroit, Michigan. Rated 5.0/5 with 11 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Elite Credit Solutions Michigan Credit Repair is a credit repair provider serving clients in Detroit, Michigan. Carrying a 5.0/5.0 Google rating from 11 reviews, Elite Credit Solutions Michigan Credit Repair has an exceptional reputation among consumers in the Detroit area looking to repair and improve their credit scores.

Elite Credit Solutions Michigan Credit Repair specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores.

When evaluating credit repair services in Detroit, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. Elite Credit Solutions Michigan Credit Repair operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Detroit, Michigan area who are considering Elite Credit Solutions Michigan Credit Repair should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
